{{Missing Info}}

= 1st Anniversary =
<div style="float:left;"><ul>
<li style="display: inline-block;vertical-align:top">[[File:1st Anniversary Poster.png|200px|left|alt=1st Anniversary]]</li>
<li style="display: inline-block;vertical-align:top">[[File:Cheers to 1 Year Poster.png|150px|left|alt=Cheers to 1 Year]]</li>
</ul></div>
[[File:We Are Family Poster.png|200px|right|alt=We Are Family]]
Aug. 02 - Aug. 29 2024

'''Official News Announcement:''' https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=86<br>
https://snail-na.qcplay.com/official/news-details.html?id=87
{{Clear}}

* {{RewardIconWithText|Bird}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Celebration Ticket}}


{{RewardIconWithText|Birthday Party Pack}} were available in Value Packs and contained:
* {{RewardIconWithText|Snail Coin, +1}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|EXP Cake, +6}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Candle of Skill, +6}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Flower, +100}}


{{RewardIconWithText|Thank-you Pack}} were available for purchase every day in the store. They contained
* {{RewardIconWithText|Snail Coin, +3}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|EXP Cake, +18}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Candle of Skill, +18}}
* {{RewardIconWithText|Flower, +300}}

= Relic Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Snail|orange}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Anniversary Cake|green}}
* {{RewardIconWithLink|We Are Family|green}}

= Home Decoration Rewards =
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Family Photo|black|Home Decoration}} (Home Decoration)

= Robot Rewards = 
* {{RewardIconWithLink|Robot Guard|orange|Robot}}

[[Category:Events]]
